steps.title: Compare native and non-native counts
steps.content: The task asks for a comparison of how many native and non-native species were catalogued. The notes give 15 native species and 29 non-native species.

steps.title: State the count relationship
steps.content: A names two examples but not the totals, B only says both kinds were catalogued, and C shifts to non-native birds. The needed comparison is that researchers found more non-native seed species than native species. The answer is D.
